beer.beer_description: Peaking in the 1990s, this boozy fun run saw groups of mates pulling on their running shorts and fluro mesh singlets, clipping up their cash-filled bum bags and run a 16-kilometre course through inner Brisbane, stopping at 21 pubs along the way for a pot. As the story goes, runners were paired-up to make sure their run buddy didn’t cheat, both the run and the beer quota. The 21 Pubs Pale Ale is our cheers to these fine athletic specimens. A refreshing, medium-bodied and hard-working American pale ale.

items.badge_description: Wow, just wow! Our little Untappd community has grown far beyond our wildest dreams, and we would like to express our heartfelt gratitude to every single one of you for helping us reach 150,000 followers on Instagram. To honor this achievement, we are rolling out the “150K” badge. Make sure you're following us @untappd!

It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That's 450 check-ins with a photo.  Try 5 more for Level 91!

Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 20 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 5!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 10 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 3!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 10 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 3.

items.badge_description:
Your favorite badge-hunting badgers return for Untappd Badgevent Week, and you've unlocked Day 3 of this inaugural set of badges. Keep checking in through December 12th, 2025, to complete the set!

This holiday season, let’s raise our glasses to the wild ride that has been 2025 and toast to all the good times we had along the way!

Wine isn't the only beverage worthy of pairing with a delicious meal. With so many styles widely available, there’s a perfect pint for any cuisine of your choosing. That's a beer at 35 different venues categorized as a Restaurant. Try 5 more for Level 8!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 95 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 20!
Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 5 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 2.
